visits.note: Initial visit for patient with hypertension and hyperlipidemia. Patient reports headaches and fatigue. BP 140/90, HbA1c 7.2, LDL 130. Started on Amlodipine 5mg and Atorvastatin 20mg.

Follow-up visit 6 months after initial visit. Patient reports decreased headaches, but increased fatigue. BP 145/95, HbA1c 7.8, LDL 120. BP is elevated, so increased Amlodipine to 10mg. Started on Metformin 500mg for new diagnosis of Type 2 Diabetes.

Follow-up visit 6 months after V2. Patient reports increased fatigue and swelling in legs. BP 150/100, HbA1c 8.2, LDL 110, eGFR 58. BP and eGFR are concerning for worsening kidney function. Started on Lisinopril 2.5mg to protect kidneys. Increased Metformin to 1000mg and Atorvastatin to 40mg.
